reasoning: The visualization fails to answer the specific business question 'Wieviel Umsatz hatte Teckentrup... in den Jahren 2021 bis 2024' (How much revenue did Teckentrup have... in the years 2021 to 2024). The question asks for yearly totals or a year-over-year comparison of total earnings. Instead, this chart displays monthly data points overlaid on top of each other without aggregation. This makes it impossible to read the annual totals directly. Furthermore, plotting four years of monthly bars against the same x-axis (months) creates significant visual clutter and overlap, obscuring trends rather than clarifying them. A grouped bar chart by Year or a line chart showing annual aggregates would be appropriate.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the data by year to show total revenue per year (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) using a simple bar chart or column chart. Alternatively, if monthly detail is required, use a small multiples approach or distinct lines for each year, but prioritize displaying the annual sums as requested.
